_comment: Registry of every mobile-cc demo. The single source of truth — agents add/update an entry here when they ship a feature. See demos/CONVENTIONS.md. `media` is the docs/media/<media>.{mp4,gif,png} basename a demo publishes; omit (null) for test-only workflows not embedded anywhere. `attachment_url` is the GitHub user-attachments player URL embedded in README.md (GitHub strips <video> tags, so mp4s are embedded via that URL). `recapture_pending` downgrades the resolution gate to a warning for a known-stale asset.

demos.title: Drive a live Claude Code session
demos.description: The real Claude Code TUI rendered live in the browser — project-grouped tabs (api ×3 + docs), quick-keys row, a reply composed in the Message box. The README 'See it' clip.

demos.title: A day with mobile-cc
demos.description: The day-in-the-life flow: open this morning's session, compose a reply (one-tap command chips above the box), spin up a second workspace, get a 'needs you' status dot on a session waiting at a permission prompt, jump to it, and use the pane picker to find any session. Near-fresh → juggling multiple tabs. Linked from demos/README.md (not the README hero yet).

demos.title: Switch projects with one tap
demos.description: Start in the api project, tap the docs project's tab, land on it — the project-grouped tab rail in action. Captured, not README-linked (yet).

demos.title: Pick a session from the picker
demos.description: Open the pane picker (Recent + project groups + ＋ New session) and jump to a session. Captured, not README-linked (yet).

demos.title: Read the session as a chat transcript
demos.description: Flip from the live terminal to the chat-style transcript reader (ttyview-cc). Switched via the internal view API — the build ships no UI control for it (see UX issue). Captured, not README-linked.

demos.title: Start a session from a button
demos.description: Tap ＋ on the tab rail → the three-way new-session menu → create a bare shell, a new tab appears. Captured, not README-linked.

demos.title: Image paste end-to-end
demos.description: Paste a screenshot into the Message box -> uploads to the daemon -> Claude Code's vision pipeline reads the [image:/abs/path]. Captured, not README-linked (yet).

demos.title: Install via curl | bash
demos.description: The `curl ... | bash` install flow: download from GitHub Releases, verify (minisign/provenance/sha256), drop the systemd user unit, print the URL.

demos.title: Install via Homebrew
demos.description: `brew install eyalev/tap/mobile-cc` — the tap install path (binary only, no systemd unit).
